Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

reaborn v1.0.0

CRAN release: 2026-06-30

  • Initial release.

What’s Changed

  • v0.0.0.9000 by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/1
  • Add air format check CI workflow and config by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/12
  • Add air format suggest CI workflow by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/8
  • Add main branch version badge workflow by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/9
  • Remove look-alike sentence from pkgdown homepage figcaption by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/2
  • fix(barplot): match seaborn CI error-bar line thickness by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/3
  • Fix grammar on ‘seaborn defaults, on import’ card by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/4
  • Rework landing-page fidelity card for accuracy by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/5
  • Match seaborn’s colorbar format in heatmap() by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/7
  • Adopt eyeris multi-platform build/check workflow by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/10
  • Match seaborn’s KDE/hue legend styling by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/11
  • ci: regenerate hero collage on merge to main by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/13
  • Add spellcheck CI workflow for R package docs by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/14
  • Match seaborn’s legend background color and inside placement by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/6
  • style: apply air formatting across the codebase by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/15
  • chore(figures): refresh hero collage by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/17
  • docs: add status badges to README and pkgdown home page by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/18
  • chore: add spelling WORDLIST to pass spellcheck by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/16
  • chore(figures): refresh hero collage by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/19
  • chore: add Lifecycle and pkgdown to WORDLIST by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/21
  • fix(ci): stop hero-collage workflow from looping refresh PRs by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/22
  • chore: rename pkgdown badge title to “website” by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/23
  • chore: add “dev” to spellcheck wordlist by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/25
  • chore(badge): relabel “main” version badge as “dev version” by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/24
  • chore(figures): refresh hero collage by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/20
  • ci(figures): auto-regenerate compare-*.png on code changes by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/26
  • chore(figures): refresh comparison figures by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/27
  • docs(comparison): remove fidelity paragraph from vs Seaborn page by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/28
  • docs(comparison): drop palette-system bullet from vs-seaborn page by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/29
  • docs(comparison): remove statistics bullet from vs seaborn page by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/30
  • docs(comparison): remove “honest framing” sentence from vs seaborn page by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/31
  • docs(comparison): reword “skip the boilerplate” bullet by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/32
  • docs(comparison): remove feature comparison table from vs Seaborn page by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/34
  • docs: add NEWS.md changelog for pkgdown site by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/33
  • feat(logo): hex sticker logo + right-aligned README logo by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/35
  • Update README.md by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/36
  • Set new hex sticker logo as website favicon by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/37
  • feat(website): show hex sticker logo in navbar on every page by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/38
  • fix(website): show navbar hex logo on all pages (root-relative paths) by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/39
  • chore: ignore .air.toml in package build by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/40
  • fix(website): use absolute URL for navbar logo to unblock pkgdown build by @shawntz in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/41

New Contributors

  • @shawntz made their first contribution in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/1
  • @github-actions[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/pull/17

Full Changelog: https://github.com/shawntz/reaborn/commits/v1.0.0

On this page

Developed by Shawn Schwartz.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
